name: External RED Speaker for Security Camera
description: External RED speaker designed specifically for security cameras. High-quality audio output with weatherproof design. Compatible with all major CCTV brands.

name: External Speaker for Security Camera
description: White external speaker for security cameras. Clear audio output, easy installation. Compatible with most CCTV systems.

name: External MIC for Security Camera
description: High-sensitivity external microphone for security cameras. Captures audio clearly up to 10 meters. Plug and play installation.

name: CCTV Camera Stand 12"
description: Heavy-duty 12-inch CCTV camera wall mount stand. Made from premium steel with powder coating. Supports all dome and bullet cameras.

name: CCTV Camera Stand 18"
description: Heavy-duty 18-inch CCTV camera wall mount stand. Made from premium steel with powder coating. Ideal for wide-angle coverage.

name: CCTV Camera Stand 24"
description: Heavy-duty 24-inch CCTV camera wall mount stand. Extra-long arm for difficult mounting positions. Supports cameras up to 2kg.

name: BNC Balun 8MP
description: 8MP BNC Balun for transmitting HD video over UTP cable. Supports up to 8MP resolution. Pair required for one channel.

name: BNC Connector
description: Standard BNC connector for CCTV coaxial cable. Screw-type design for easy installation. Compatible with RG59 cables.

name: CCTV Camera Cage
description: Black protective cage for CCTV cameras. Prevents vandalism and tampering. Fits most dome and bullet cameras.

name: DC Pin Connector
description: DC power pin connector for CCTV cameras. Standard 5.5mm x 2.1mm size. Pack of 1 piece.

name: BNC to RC Convertor
description: BNC to RCA converter adapter for connecting CCTV cameras to TV or monitor. Gold-plated connectors for best signal quality.

name: HDMI Cable 1.5 MTR
description: High-speed HDMI cable 1.5 meters. Supports 4K@60Hz, HDR, and 18Gbps bandwidth. Gold-plated connectors for reliable signal.

name: HDMI Cable 3 MTR
description: High-speed HDMI cable 3 meters. Supports 4K@60Hz, HDR, ARC, and Ethernet. Durable braided jacket.

name: HDMI Cable 5 MTR
description: High-speed HDMI cable 5 meters. Supports 4K@30Hz. Ideal for connecting PC to TV or monitor across rooms.

name: HDMI Cable 10 MTR
description: High-speed HDMI cable 10 meters. Supports 1080p Full HD. Signal booster built-in for stable transmission.

name: HDMI Cable 15 MTR
description: High-speed HDMI cable 15 meters. Supports 1080p Full HD with active signal booster. Perfect for conference rooms.

name: HDMI Cable 20 MTR
description: Active HDMI cable 20 meters. Built-in signal amplifier. Supports 1080p Full HD. Ideal for large installations.

name: HDMI Cable 25 MTR
description: Active HDMI cable 25 meters. High-speed with built-in signal booster. Supports 1080p Full HD. For professional AV installations.

name: AC to DC 12V 2AMP Adapter
description: AC to DC power adapter 12V 2A output. Input: 100-240V AC. Switching power supply with overload protection.

name: AC to DC 5V 1AMP Adapter
description: AC to DC power adapter 5V 1A output. Compact design with universal AC input. Short-circuit protection included.

name: Power Supply 4CH ECO
description: 4-channel CCTV power supply ECO grade. 12V DC output per channel. Individual fuse protection. Metal enclosure.

name: Power Supply 4CH Standard
description: 4-channel CCTV power supply Standard grade. 12V/1A per channel. Lockable metal box. LED indicators for each channel.

name: Power Supply 8CH ECO
description: 8-channel CCTV power supply ECO grade. 12V DC per channel. Individual fuses. Suitable for small to medium CCTV setups.

name: Power Supply 8CH Standard
description: 8-channel CCTV power supply Standard grade. 12V/1A per channel. Heavy-duty metal box with key lock. LED indicators.

name: Power Supply 16CH Standard
description: 16-channel CCTV power supply Standard grade. 12V/1A per channel. Large metal enclosure with key lock. Suitable for large installations.

name: POE Injector 4 Port
description: 4-port POE injector for IP cameras. 48V DC output. Supports 802.3af standard. Powers cameras over Ethernet cable.

name: DVR Battery 1220 3V
description: CR1220 3V lithium coin cell battery for DVR CMOS. Long shelf life. Maintains DVR date and time settings.

name: DVR Battery 2032 3V
description: CR2032 3V lithium coin cell battery for DVR CMOS. Standard size for most DVRs. 5-year shelf life.

name: 1000Mbps 8 Port Desktop Switch
description: Gigabit 8-port unmanaged desktop switch. 1000Mbps per port. Plug and play, auto-MDI/MDIX. Fanless silent operation.

name: 1000Mbps 5 Port Desktop Switch
description: Gigabit 5-port unmanaged desktop switch. 1000Mbps per port. Compact design for home and office networks.

name: POE Switch 4+2 CH with Giga Uplink
description: 4 POE + 2 Uplink ports. 100Mbps POE ports with 1000Mbps Gigabit uplinks. 802.3af/at compatible. For IP cameras.

name: POE Switch 8+2 CH with Giga Uplink
description: 8 POE + 2 Uplink ports. 100Mbps POE ports with Gigabit uplinks. 802.3af/at. Total POE budget 120W.

name: POE Switch 8+2 CH Full Giga
description: 8 Full Gigabit POE + 2 SFP uplink ports. 1000Mbps per POE port. 802.3af/at. 150W total POE budget.

name: DVR Rack 2U
description: 2U standard 19-inch rack for DVR/NVR installation. Powder-coated steel. Adjustable depth brackets. Vented for cooling.

name: POE Box
description: Wall-mount enclosure box for POE switches and network equipment. Ventilated design. Lockable for security.

name: Camera Box 5x5
description: 5x5 inch junction box for CCTV cable connections. White PVC material. Weather resistant. Easy screw-mount installation.

name: Camera Box 4x4
description: 4x4 inch junction box for CCTV cable connections. White PVC material. Compact size for wall mounting.

name: SSD 512 GB
description: 512GB SATA SSD for DVR/NVR storage upgrade. Read up to 550MB/s, Write up to 500MB/s. 3-year warranty.

name: SSD 1 TB
description: 1TB SATA SSD for high-capacity DVR/NVR storage. High-speed read/write. Shock resistant. 3-year warranty.

name: SD Card 32GB Class 10
description: 32GB Class 10 SD card for IP cameras and DVRs. High-speed write for continuous recording. 4K video compatible.

name: SD Card 64GB Class 10
description: 64GB Class 10 SD card. High endurance for 24/7 CCTV recording. Supports up to 4K video. Wide temperature range.

name: SD Card 128GB Class 10
description: 128GB Class 10 SDXC card by ADATA. High endurance for continuous security recording. 4K video support.

name: HDMI 5 to 1 Switch
description: 5-in-1 HDMI switch with remote control. Connect 5 HDMI sources to 1 display. Supports 4K@30Hz, 3D. Auto-switch feature.

description: K12 wireless Bluetooth speaker with built-in microphone. Portable design. 5-hour battery life. 10m wireless range.

name: CY-666 Bluetooth Speaker
description: CYOMI CY-666 10W Bluetooth speaker. Rich bass output. Built-in FM radio. USB and TF card playback. RGB lighting.

name: Solar Interaction Wall Lamp
description: Solar-powered outdoor wall lamp with motion detection. Waterproof IP65. Auto on/off. No wiring required.

name: Camping Lamp
description: Rechargeable LED camping lamp. 3 brightness modes. 360-degree lighting. Foldable and portable design. USB charging.

name: 120W Fast Charging Data Cable
description: 120W super fast charging data cable. Type-C to Type-C. Supports 120W PD fast charging. Durable braided nylon jacket.

name: Gel Tape
description: Multi-purpose nano gel tape. Reusable and washable. Holds up to 3kg. No residue on removal. Transparent.

description: 3+1 coaxial cable ECO grade. 90 meters roll. 3 coax + 1 power wire. Suitable for AHD/TVI/CVI cameras up to 2MP.

description: 3+1 coaxial cable Standard grade. 90 meters roll. Better copper core for HD signal. Supports 5MP cameras.

description: 3+1 coaxial cable Gold grade. 90 meters roll. Premium copper conductor. Supports 8MP/4K cameras. Lowest signal loss.

description: CAT6 UTP LAN cable Standard grade. Price per meter. Enhanced copper core. Better crosstalk reduction.

description: CAT5E UTP LAN cable Gold grade. Price per meter. 24AWG copper conductor. Supports up to 1Gbps at 100MHz.

description: USB 3.0 printer cable 1.5 meters. Type-A to Type-B. High-speed data transfer. Compatible with all printers.

description: USB 2.0 extension cable 1.5 meters. Type-A male to Type-A female. For keyboards, mice, USB drives.

description: USB 2.0 extension cable 3 meters. Type-A male to Type-A female. Shielded cable to reduce interference.

description: USB 2.0 active extension cable 5 meters. Built-in signal booster chip. Supports all USB 2.0 devices.

name: Wireless Mouse ECO
description: ENTER ECO wireless mouse. 2.4GHz wireless. 1000/1600 DPI. Nano USB receiver. 12 months battery life.

name: Wireless Mouse M05
description: GREEN HOME INDIA M05 wireless mouse. Ergonomic design. 2.4GHz wireless, 1600 DPI optical sensor. Silent click buttons.

name: LAN Tester
